ASBESTOS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-27-2017 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-23-2017 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Granting Preference In Setting Case For Trial, Maintaining The Current Trial Date
Off Calendar Nov-17-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Tiffany Viveros of BRAYTON & PURCELL LLP (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiffs / moving parties Joel Collins and Jean Collins
Laura Przetak of SPANOS | PRZETAK (510-250-0200), Designated Defense Counsel

RULING:
PLAINTIFFS' MOTION FOR ORDER GRANTING PREFERENCE IN SETTING CASE FOR TRIAL, MAINTAINING THE CURRENT TRIAL DATE

No objections made and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiffs' motion to maintain the trial date with preference is granted. The April 11, 2016 trial date, which has a next return date of January 23, 2017, is maintained with preference status pursuant to C.C.P. 36(a). Last day pursuant to C.C.P. 36(f) is March 17, 2017. Fact and expert discovery remain closed. The parties are ordered to provide confidential settlement demands stating their best and final offers. These confidential demands must be submitted to Pang Ly by January 9, 2017 at 2:00p.m. Settlement conference in room 603 at 9:30a.m. on January 12, 2017. There will be a mandatory settlement conference with the Court pursuant to San Francisco Local Rules of Court Rule 5 on January 23, 2017 at 1:30p.m. in Department 503. The parties shall comply with Local Rule 5.0 and provide a confidential settlement statement by January 19, 2017 at 2:00p.m. No opposition filed. signed in open court. Judge: Garrett L. Wong, Reporter: Erin F. Robinson of AIKEN WELCH, CSR # 12199 (Tel: 510-451-1580) (503/GLW)
